nodes.name: export-pdf.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script for exporting presentation slides to PDF, providing logging helpers (info, ok, warn, err) and orchestrating the full slide-export pipeline including dependency checks and file output.
nodes.languageNotes: 418-line shell script with structured logging functions; the four helper functions (info, ok, warn, err) are one-liners and fall below the significance filter.

nodes.name: extract-pptx.py
nodes.summary: Python script using python-pptx to extract text content and embedded images from a PPTX file, writing per-slide text files and image files to a structured output directory.

nodes.name: extract_pptx
nodes.summary: Loads a PPTX file and iterates over slides to extract text frames and embedded images, writing text to .txt files and images to per-slide output directories.
